title: Four Candies Metal Mechanical Pencil Set, 3PCS Art Drafting Pencils 0.5, 0.7, 0.9MM & 2PCS 2MM Mechanical Drawing Pencils with 420PCS Leads (4B 2B HB 2H Color) for Writing Sketching Drawing (Black)
features: [Advanced Pencil Set] Includes 5 full body metal mechanical pencils, 4 models (0.5mm, 0.7mm, 0.9mm & 2pcs 2.0mm) and 6 tubes of 0.5, 0.7, 0.9mm resin leads, 5 tubes of 2.0mm graphite leads , 2pcs lead sharpeners, 2pcs 4B-soft erasers, 1 kneaded eraser, 1 tube eraser refills (9pcs / tube)

[More Leads, Multiple Models & Hardness] The drawing pencil set includes 420PCS lead refills. Each variant of 0.5mm, 0.7mm, and 0.9mm resin leads comes in 2 tubes (60 pcs/tube), offering a smooth and sturdy writing experience, ideal for drafting with varied line thicknesses. The 2.0mm graphite leads are available in 5 tubes (4B, 2B, HB, 2H, and one tube of colored leads, 12 pcs/tube), perfect for sketching with different hardness in the art work.

[High-Quality Metal Pencil] The all-metal body design provides an ideal weight balance for fatigue-free writing and drawing, and the metal threaded pencil grip enhances friction to prevent slipping during use. The internal metal spring and brass three-claw design provide a buffering effect on the lead core, greatly reducing the possibility of lead sticking and slipping.

[Functional Design] The caps for the 0.5mm, 0.7mm, and 0.9mm drafting pencils come equipped with eraser refills, ensuring accurate erasure of handwriting. The caps of the 2.0mm sketching pencil feature a lead sharpener design, allowing you to sharpen the pencil lead at any time.

[Ideal Drawing Pencil] An art mechanical pencil set specially designed for artists, teachers and students. Great for writing, drafting, drawing, sketching. If you have any questions, please contact us in time, we will give you a satisfactory answer within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page 1 For Industrial Drawing 2 For Art Sketching 3 For School Exams Are these mechanical pencils comfortable to hold? Yes, our metal pencil grips have a knurled design that can prevent slipping. How many lead refills does it come with in each size? 0.5mm, 0.7mm, 0.9mm resin lead, 2 tubes for each model (60PCS / tube, HB) 5 tubes of 2.0mm leads (4B 2B HB 2H and a tube of colored lead, 12PCS / tube) How is the pencil set organized? This mechanical pencil comes with a storage box and a built-in storage tray, allowing pencils and other accessories to be neatly stored in corresponding places. This is the perfect gift for your friends and family who love to draw! Are these pencil leads easy to break? No, the pencil lead is made of high-quality resin and graphite, which is strong and durable. The total 420PCS leads can last you a long time. How much does this pencil weigh? This mechanical pencil is fully metal and weighs almost 17 grams, allowing you to maintain a strong sense of balance when sketching or writing.
